{{CargoRelic
|name=Pritzker Medal
|class_id=20408
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Pritzker Medal is known as the Nobel Prize for architecture. About 500 architects are nominated every year, but only one winner is awarded for outstanding talent, imagination, and responsibility.
|fame=27
|art=17
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=18
|ss1=Relic Stars required to upgrade Buildings -5%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Relic Stars required to upgrade Buildings -10%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Relic Stars required to upgrade Buildings -15%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Relic Stars required to upgrade Buildings -15%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Relic Stars required to upgrade Buildings -15%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
